message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title UML Diagram: DataType CorrespondenceDefinition in Context skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam roundcorner 12 skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam class { BackgroundColor #F2F2F2 BorderColor #666666 HeaderBackgroundColor #F2F2F2 FontColor #000000 } skinparam note { BackgroundColor white BorderColor black } note top right Hints - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information. - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page. - The use of the data type is represented here by a dotted line (not formal UML). end note class "CollectionsPattern::\nCollectionsPattern::\nMap" as MapBox { correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition } class "Conceptual::\nConceptual::\nConceptMap" as ConceptMapBox { correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition displayLabel : LabelForDisplay identifier : Identifier usage : InternationalString validDates : DateRange } class "FormatDescription::\nFormatDescription::\nInstanceVariableMap" as InstanceVariableMapBox { comparison : ComparisonOperator correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition identifier : Identifier setValue : String } class "«dataType»\nCorrespondenceDefinition" as CorrespondenceDefinitionBox #FFD800 { commonality : InternationalString commonalityCode : ControlledVocabularyEntry difference : InternationalString matching : MatchingCriterion } MapBox .. CorrespondenceDefinitionBox ConceptMapBox .. CorrespondenceDefinitionBox InstanceVariableMapBox .. CorrespondenceDefinitionBox @enduml ```
